item.name: Authentication
item.description: API endpoints for user authentication and token management

request.description: Creates a new user account and returns an authentication token.
Authenticates user credentials and returns a Sanctum token.

item.name: Logout user and invalidate current token.

request.description: Invalidates the authentication token used for this request.
Returns the currently authenticated user's information.

item.name: Catalog Synchronization
item.description: API endpoints for triggering and monitoring product catalog synchronization

item.name: Dispatch a sync job for the given tenant.

request.description: Triggers an asynchronous sync job for the specified tenant.

item.name: Get the status of a sync operation.

request.description: Returns the current status of a sync job including progress and error details.

item.name: Get sync history with pagination and filtering.

query.description: optional Filter by status (pending, running, completed, failed, partially_failed).

request.description: Returns paginated list of sync operations for the current tenant.

item.name: Index Management
item.description: API endpoints for managing Elasticsearch index operations (async)

item.name: Start async reindex of all tenant products.

request.description: Triggers an asynchronous reindex job for the tenant's product catalog.
Returns the current status and progress of an index job.

item.name: List recent jobs for a tenant.

query.description: optional Filter by status (pending, running, completed, failed).

request.description: Returns a list of recent index operations for the specified tenant.

item.name: Product Search
item.description: API endpoints for searching products within tenant catalogs using Elasticsearch

item.name: Search products within a tenant's catalog.

request.description: Performs full-text search with fuzzy matching and pagination.

item.name: Get search index status for a tenant.

request.description: Returns information about the Elasticsearch index status.

item.name: Reindex all products for a tenant.

request.description: Rebuilds the Elasticsearch search index for all tenant products.

item.name: Sync Logs
item.description: API endpoints for accessing detailed sync log information

request.description:
Returns comprehensive details including error payloads, stack traces,
products summary, and timing information.

item.name: Tenant Management
item.description: API endpoints for managing client stores (tenants)

item.name: Display a listing of the user's tenants.

request.description: Returns all tenants associated with the authenticated user.

item.name: Store a newly created tenant in storage.

request.description: Creates a new tenant with encrypted API credentials.
Returns detailed information about a specific tenant.

item.name: Update the specified tenant in storage.

request.description: Updates tenant information. Only provided fields will be updated.

item.name: Remove the specified tenant from storage.

request.description: Permanently deletes the tenant and all associated data.
